summary: Autonomous classification only. No GitHub mutations performed. The original canonical PR #40443 is now closed and its replacement #72624 is security-sensitive, so it must be quarantined. The cluster contains at least two non-security bug families: explicit config reload stale state (#40352/#40443/#72624) and Agents overview model-select drift/catalog/page-load behavior (#39392/#52948/#54724). Open non-security issues/PRs should remain open; no closeout is safe until a non-security canonical fix path lands.
